hooks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$f = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH; if ($f -match 'GA\.Business\.DSL|GaSurfaceSyntaxParser|GaClosureRegistry|PipelineClosures|GaComputationExpression') { Write-Host '🔍 DSL file changed — running fast DSL tests...'; dotnet test Tests/Common/GA.Business.DSL.Tests/GA.Business.DSL.Tests.csproj --no-build -q 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5 }"
pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$f = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH; if ($f -match '\.agent/skills|\.agent/agents|\.claude/settings') { Write-Host '🛡️  Agent config changed: ' + $f }"

pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host ''; Write-Host '🎸 Guitar Alchemist — Session Context' -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host ('  Branch : ' + (git branch --show-current)) -ForegroundColor Gray; Write-Host ('  Last 3 : ' + ((git log --oneline -3) -join ' | ')) -ForegroundColor Gray; $open = (git diff --stat HEAD 2>$null | Select-Object -Last 1); if ($open) { Write-Host ('  Dirty  : ' + $open) -ForegroundColor Yellow }; Write-Host '  Skills : /compound  /feature  /ga  /ce:review' -ForegroundColor DarkCyan; Write-Host ''"
